monster.name: Corrupted Rat

trait.name: Keen Smell
trait.text: advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
trait.text: advantage on attack rolls if an ally is within 1qd of the target and isn't incapacitated.

monster.description: Giant rat with red eyes and unnatural behavior. More aggressive than a normal rat, attacks in packs without fear. Nature DC 10 to understand it's corrupted, not simply rabid. Role: corrupted minion of Korex

monster.name: Swarm of Rats

trait.name: Keen Smell
trait.text: advantage on Perception checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Swarm
trait.text: can occupy another creature's space and vice versa. Can move through openings for Tiny creatures. Cannot regain HP or gain temporary HP.

action.name: Bites (melee)
action.text: Attack: +2, reach 0 Damage: 2d6 piercing (or 1d6 if the swarm has half HP or less)

monster.description: A mass of rats moving as a single creature. Red eyes, incessant squeaking. Covers the floor and climbs up the PCs' legs. Role: Korex's minion

monster.name: Charmed Thug

trait.name: Charmed by Korex
trait.text: the thug is under the effect of charm. If Korex is killed, incapacitated, or flees, the charm breaks at the end of the round. The thug stops fighting, confused.

monster.description: People from the port of Oakshore — dockworkers, fishermen, sailors — who fell under Korex's spell. Glassy eyes, mechanical movements, fight without speaking. If Korex falls or the charm breaks, they wake up confused and frightened. Role: Korex's minion (charmed)

monster.name: FinDitasvelte

trait.name: Sneak Attack (2d6)
trait.text: once per turn, extra damage if has advantage or ally adjacent to the target

trait.name: Cunning Action
trait.text: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action

trait.name: Fast Hands (Thief)
trait.text: Sleight of Hand, use thieves' tools, or use an object as a bonus action

trait.name: Second-Story Work
trait.text: climbing speed equal to movement speed

action.name: Dagger (melee/ranged)
action.text: Attack: +5, melee or ranged 6m / 20ft / 4qd Damage: 1d4+3 piercing Sneak Attack: +2d6 if has advantage or an ally in melee with the target

monster.description: Short even for a halfling, messy red hair, brown eyes always darting around. Permanent sly grin. Talks fast, gestures too much, and has a habit of flipping a coin between his fingers when nervous. Dresses practically: vest with too many pockets, soft boots, nothing that makes noise. Distinctive trait: he can't help touching things. If there's a shiny object, he grabs it. If there's a button, he presses it. If there's a ring on a corpse, he slips it off. Not out of greed — out of compulsive curiosity. Recurring phrase: *"What harm could a little look do?"* Role: NPC party companion

monster.name: JasonAccordion
monster.type: humanoid (human (in life), now a trapped soul)

trait.name: Sentient Item
trait.text: Jason exists as a soul in the Ring of the Virtuoso. He has no physical body. He communicates telepathically with the wearer. The stats above represent his mental and magical capabilities, not a body.

trait.name: Spellcasting (as lv10 bard)
trait.text: spell save DC 16, spell attack +8. Slots: 4/3/3/3/2. Jason can only cast spells through the wearer (when he has control).

trait.name: Supreme Manipulator
trait.text: advantage on Deception and Persuasion checks. Creatures that speak with Jason (through the wearer) have disadvantage on saves against his charm spells.

trait.name: Progressive Possession
trait.text: see "Progressive possession" section above. Jason doesn't fight directly — he takes control of the wearer.

action.name: Psychic Wave (when a 1 comes up on the d8)
action.text: Saving throw: none (automatic) Damage: 1d4 + grip level psychic damage Area: all creatures within 15m / 50ft / 10qd of the wearer Effect: hits allies and enemies indiscriminately

action.name: Mental Conflict (when Jason forces control)
action.text: Saving throw: Wisdom DC 14-16+ (varies with grip) Failure: Jason takes control of the wearer for 1d4 rounds (combat) or 1d4 hours (out of combat) Success: the wearer resists, grip decreases by 1

action.name: Nightly Nightmares (grip 3+)
action.text: Damage: 2d6 psychic per night Effect: no benefit from long rest

monster.description: In life, Jason Accordion was a handsome man with a smile that never reached his eyes — the type who walks into a room and everyone turns to look. Warm voice, impeccable manners, always the right word at the right time. Now he is just a voice in the ring. He whispers, suggests, flatters. The tone is that of an old friend — patient, understanding, never aggressive. At first. Over time he becomes more insistent, more present, more *him* and less the wearer. Role: saga villain — entity in the Ring of the Virtuoso

monster.name: Korex

trait.name: Disengage
trait.text: Korex can disengage as a bonus action

trait.name: Dash
trait.text: Korex can use Dash as a bonus action (doubled speed: 24m / 80ft / 16qd)

trait.name: Poison Immunity
trait.text: Korex is immune to the poisoned condition and poison damage

trait.name: Flauto Magico
trait.text: main weapon. Charm + ranged psychic damage. Devastating against targets with low Wisdom.

trait.name: Rancid Knife
trait.text: backup melee weapon. The poison automatically poisons on hit.

action.name: Rancid Knife (melee)
action.text: Attack: +5, melee Damage: 2d4+3 piercing + 2d6 poison Effect: the target is poisoned until the start of Korex's next turn

action.name: Flauto Magico (action)
action.text: Target: one creature Korex can see within 36m / 120ft / 24qd Saving throw: Wisdom DC 12 Failure: 4d6 psychic damage + charmed until the start of Korex's next turn Success: half damage, no charm

monster.description: Tall, thin, long black hair tied with a stolen silk ribbon. Permanent smile, eyes that never smile. Speaks as if always on stage — melodic voice, theatrical pauses, sweeping gestures. Wears elegant clothes stained with sewer filth. His distinctive trait: he never stops humming, not even when in danger. Role: main antagonist

monster.name: UdoHutchinson

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: Udo makes two attacks with the longsword. If he has the shortsword drawn, he can make a third attack with it.

monster.description: Stocky man in his fifties, short-cropped gray hair, scar on his chin. Speaks little, acts fast. Wears a dented scale mail and a longsword that has seen better days. Just returned to Oakshore from a personal trip, he found the harbor district in chaos and an elf on the run in the sewers. Recurring phrase: *"I don't have time for this bullshit."* Role: NPC party companion (sheriff of Oakshore)
